Last login: Fri Apr 24 23:10:20 on ttys000
❯ cat ~/Applications/"Philippe.app"/Contents/MacOS/launcher
#!/bin/zsh
# Generated by AppCloner (PWA mode). Do not edit — regenerated on each clone.

PROFILE_DIR="/Users/b519hs/Library/Application Support/AppCloner/Philippe_pwa"
LOCK_FILE="$PROFILE_DIR/appcloner.lock"
LOG_FILE="/tmp/appcloner_pwa_fr.b519hs.clone.1777141740.log"
SWIFT_HELPER="$PROFILE_DIR/switch_space.swift"
SPACE_HINT="$PROFILE_DIR/target_space_uuid"
USER_DATA_DIR="/Users/b519hs/Library/Application Support/AppCloner/Philippe_pwa"

# ── Singleton check ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# If a lock file exists with a live PID, this is a duplicate launch — focus
# the existing Edge window and exit immediately without starting a new one.
if [[ -f "$LOCK_FILE" ]]; then
	OLD_PID="$(cat "$LOCK_FILE" 2>/dev/null)"
	if [[ -n "$OLD_PID" ]] && kill -0 "$OLD_PID" 2>/dev/null; then
		# Find the Edge process that has this profile's --user-data-dir in its
		# command line — more reliable than pgrep -P which only finds direct children.
		EDGE_PID="$(pgrep -f "user-data-dir=$USER_DATA_DIR" 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
		if [[ -n "$EDGE_PID" ]]; then
			osascript -e "tell application \"System Events\" to set frontmost of (first process whose unix id is $EDGE_PID) to true" 2>/dev/null || true
		fi
		exit 0
	fi
	rm -f "$LOCK_FILE"
fi

# ── First launch ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
echo $$ > "$LOCK_FILE"
trap 'rm -f "$LOCK_FILE"' EXIT INT TERM

# Switch to the target Space before launching Edge so Edge opens there naturally.
# The hint is consumed once; later launches let Edge remember its own position.
if [[ -f "$SPACE_HINT" && -f "$SWIFT_HELPER" ]]; then
	TARGET_UUID="$(cat "$SPACE_HINT")"
	rm -f "$SPACE_HINT"
	swift "$SWIFT_HELPER" "$TARGET_UUID" 2>/dev/null || true
fi

# Launch Edge as a background child so this script stays alive (= Dock tile
# stays associated with our bundle-id). We wait on the child so the tile
# disappears when the user quits Edge.
"/Applications/Microsoft Edge.app/Contents/MacOS/Microsoft Edge" \
	--app="https://teams.microsoft.com/l/chat/19:bcbdf563-3c5d-483c-bdf1-002b202f6dd9_be264a6c-8397-4900-8325-fbf85fab60e6@unq.gbl.spaces/conversations?context=%7B%22contextType%22%3A%22chat%22%7D" \
	--user-data-dir="/Users/b519hs/Library/Application Support/AppCloner/Philippe_pwa" \
	--no-first-run \
	--no-default-browser-check \
	--disable-features=DesktopPWAsLinkCapturing,WebAppEnableUrlHandling \
	--disable-default-apps \
	>>$LOG_FILE 2>&1 &
EDGE_PID=$!
wait $EDGE_PID
❯ cat ~/Library/Application\ Support/AppCloner/*_pwa/appcloner.lock 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; ls ~/Library/Application\ Support/AppCloner/*_pwa/ 2>/dev/null
90947

128 B  󰉍 Downloads
2.9 KB  Library
128 B   Movies
 96 B  󱍙 Music
 47 B   'OneDrive - AXA' ⇒ /Users/b519hs/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-AXA
320 B   perso
224 B  󰉏 Pictures
160 B   Public
